title: Archives & Compression
html:
Archives & Compression

Contents

  • tar
  • gzip / bzip2 / xz / zstd
  • zip / unzip
  • 7z (high ratio + AES encryption)

tar

CommandDescription
 
tar -czvf out.tgz dir/
create gzip tar
tar -cjvf out.tbz dir/
create bzip2 tar
tar -cJvf out.txz dir/
create xz tar (best ratio)
tar -xzvf in.tgz
extract gzip tar
tar -xzvf in.tgz -C /tmp
extract to specific dir
tar -tzvf in.tgz
list contents without extracting
tar -xzvf in.tgz path/inside
extract one path

gzip / bzip2 / xz / zstd

CommandDescription
 
gzip file        # -> file.gz
gunzip file.gz
zcat file.gz
cat through gzip without extracting
xz file          # -> file.xz
highest ratio of the classics
zstd file        # -> file.zst
modern, fast
zstd -d file.zst
decompress

zip / unzip

CommandDescription
 
zip -r out.zip dir/
create
zip -r -e out.zip dir/
with password (prompt)
unzip out.zip
extract
unzip -l out.zip
list contents
unzip out.zip -d /tmp
extract to dir

7z (high ratio + AES encryption)

CommandDescription
 
7z a out.7z dir/
create
7z a -pPASSWORD -mhe=on out.7z dir/
AES-256 + header encryption
7z a -v100m out.7z dir/
split into 100 MB parts
7z x in.7z
extract
7z l in.7z
list contents
7z t in.7z
test integrity
